query:
ALTER TABLE `candidates` MODIFY COLUMN `status` ENUM('applied','whatsapp_sent','no_answer','voice_note_reviewed','interview_scheduled','accepted','whatsapp_group_added','rejected','blacklisted','resigned','terminated') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'applied';

ALTER TABLE `stage_notes` MODIFY COLUMN `stage` ENUM('applied','whatsapp_sent','no_answer','voice_note_reviewed','interview_scheduled','accepted','whatsapp_group_added','rejected','blacklisted','resigned','terminated') NOT NULL;
